mapper.sql: message_id, message_code, message_code AS message_key, locale, message_format_type, external_message, external_message AS message_value, internal_message, parameter_count, parameter_sample, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM cpf_message ORDER BY message_code, locale

SELECT
FROM cpf_message WHERE message_code = #{messageKey} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY locale, message_id LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM cpf_message WHERE message_code = #{messageKey} AND locale = #{locale} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY message_id LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM cpf_message WHERE message_code = #{messageKey} AND locale = #{locale} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY message_id LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cpf_message ( message_code, locale, message_format_type, external_message, internal_message, parameter_count, parameter_sample, description, use_yn, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{effectiveMessageCode}, #{locale}, IFNULL(NULLIF(#{messageFormatType}, ''), 'FIXED'), #{effectiveExternalMessage}, #{effectiveInternalMessage}, IFNULL(#{parameterCount}, 0), #{parameterSample}, #{description}, IFNULL(NULLIF(#{useYn}, ''), 'Y'), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), NOW(), IFNULL(NULLIF(#{requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE cpf_message SET message_code = #{request.effectiveMessageCode}, locale = #{request.locale}, message_format_type = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.messageFormatType}, ''), 'FIXED'), external_message = #{request.effectiveExternalMessage}, internal_message = #{request.effectiveInternalMessage}, parameter_count = IFNULL(#{request.parameterCount}, 0), parameter_sample = #{request.parameterSample}, description = #{request.description}, use_yn = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.useYn}, ''), 'Y'), updated_by = IFNULL(NULLIF(#{request.requestUser}, ''), 'SYSTEM'), updated_at = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
